_instructions: Add entries when a key player is confirmed absent before kickoff. Key = home_code_away_code. home_elo_delta / away_elo_delta in ELO points (-100 = about -0.3 goals). Remove entry after match or if player recovers.

jo_dz.note: Jordan vs Algeria MD2 - Musa Al-Taamari absence would be -80 for Jordan
